steps.t: Rendal has asked you to help him gather athelas. Athelas grows around the pool near Sírlond, to the east.
You have collected enough athelas. You should return to Rendal in Sírlond.
Rendal hasn't returned, but the injured man he was tending to -- Watcyn -- wishes to speak to you.
Watcyn has asked you to rifle through Rendal's belongings, which are lying next to the tent.
Rendal's belongings have given you a better idea of what kind of person he is. You should tell Watcyn.
